assistantMessage: Generated a parity-class boardroom editorial shipping report shell with integrated filters, coordinated sections, and real-data bindings.
reportDescription: Golden parity fixture for the boardroom-editorial single-page lane.

typography.fontFamily: "Iowan Old Style", "Source Han Serif SC", "Microsoft YaHei UI", serif

js: function deriveView(context, helpers){const reportData=context.reportData;const activeFilters=context.filters.values;return {heroMetric:reportData.heroMetric,secondaryMetrics:reportData.secondaryMetrics,primaryTrend:reportData.primaryTrend,primaryRanking:reportData.primaryRanking,primaryTable:reportData.primaryTable,filterOptions:reportData.filterOptions,activeFilters};} function renderHero(view, root, helpers){const hero=root.querySelector('.hero-zone'); if(!hero)return; helpers.clearNode(hero); hero.appendChild(helpers.createElement('div','hero-title',`累计运作天数 ${helpers.formatCompactNumber(view.heroMetric?.rawValue)}`)); hero.appendChild(helpers.createElement('div','hero-note',`当前筛选 ${Object.keys(view.activeFilters||{}).length} 个条件`));} function renderKpis(view, root, helpers){const belt=root.querySelector('.kpi-belt'); if(!belt)return; helpers.clearNode(belt); (view.secondaryMetrics||[]).slice(0,4).forEach((metric)=>{const card=helpers.createElement('div','kpi-card'); card.appendChild(helpers.createElement('div','kpi-label',metric.label)); card.appendChild(helpers.createElement('div','kpi-value',metric.formattedValue)); belt.appendChild(card);});} function renderTrend(view, root, helpers){const trend=root.querySelector('.trend-zone'); if(!trend)return; helpers.clearNode(trend); const point=view.primaryTrend?.points?.[0]; trend.appendChild(helpers.createElement('div','trend-title','月度趋势')); trend.appendChild(helpers.createElement('div','trend-copy',point?`${point.label} 运作天数 ${helpers.formatCompactNumber(point.value)}`:'暂无趋势数据'));} function renderStructure(view, root, helpers){const ranking=root.querySelector('.ranking-zone'); if(!ranking)return; helpers.clearNode(ranking); ranking.appendChild(helpers.createElement('div','ranking-title','重点船舶')); (view.primaryRanking?.points||[]).slice(0,5).forEach((point)=>{const row=helpers.createElement('button','ranking-item',`${point.label} · ${helpers.formatCompactNumber(point.value)}`); row.type='button'; row.dataset.shipValue=point.label; ranking.appendChild(row);});} function renderDetail(view, root, helpers){const detail=root.querySelector('.detail-zone'); if(!detail)return; helpers.clearNode(detail); detail.appendChild(helpers.createElement('div','detail-title','明细区')); (view.primaryTable?.rows||[]).slice(0,6).forEach((row)=>{const item=helpers.createElement('div','detail-row',`${row['船名']||'-'} · ${row['月份']||'-'} · ${helpers.formatCompactNumber(row['月运作天数_汇总'])}`); detail.appendChild(item);});} function renderFilterBar(view, root, helpers){const filterBar=root.querySelector('.filter-bar'); if(!filterBar)return; helpers.clearNode(filterBar); const button=helpers.createElement('button','filter-trigger','筛选船型'); button.type='button'; button.addEventListener('click',()=>helpers.syncCanonicalFilter('shipType','4250TEU')); filterBar.appendChild(button);} function wireInteractions(context, root, helpers){root.querySelectorAll('.ranking-item').forEach((node)=>node.addEventListener('click',()=>{helpers.updatePersistentState('boardroom-ui',{focus:node.dataset.shipValue});}));} function render(context, root, helpers){const localState=helpers.getPersistentState('boardroom-ui',{}); const view=deriveView(context, helpers); renderFilterBar(view, root, helpers); renderHero(view, root, helpers); renderKpis(view, root, helpers); renderTrend(view, root, helpers); renderStructure(view, root, helpers); renderDetail(view, root, helpers); wireInteractions(context, root, helpers); return ()=>helpers.setPersistentState('boardroom-ui', localState);}
